zh.Kington, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia de Longchamp於1164年出生在英國賀福爾利沙拉爾時，她的父親Hugh de Longchamp II21歲，母親Emma St Leger22歲。她和Eustace Devereux Of Hereford至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1248年在英國賀福爾享年84歲。

zh-hans.Kington, Herefordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀福爾金頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia de Longchamp于1164年出生在英国賀福爾利沙拉爾时，她的父亲Hugh de Longchamp II21岁，母亲Emma St Leger22岁。她和Eustace Devereux Of Hereford至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1248年在英国賀福爾享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia de Longchamp was born in 1164, in Lyonshall, Herefordshire, England, her father, Hugh de Longchamp II, was 21 and her mother, Emma St Leger, was 22. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Eustace Devereux Of Hereford. She died in 1248, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia de Longchamp est née en 1164, à Lyonshall, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Longchamp II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Emma St Leger, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Eustace Devereux Of Hereford. Elle est décédée en 1248, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia de Longchamp 1164 in Lyonshall, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Longchamp II 21 und ihre Mutter Emma St Leger 22. Sie hatte mit Eustace Devereux Of Hereford mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1248 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Longchamp è nata il nel 1164 nel Lyonshall, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Longchamp II, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Emma St Leger, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Eustace Devereux Of Hereford. Morì nel 1248, nel Herefordshire, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Longchampが1164年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリオンシャルで生まれた時，父Hugh de Longchamp IIは21歳，母Emma St Legerは22歳であった。彼女はEustace Devereux Of Herefordとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1248年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Longchamp(이)가 1164년 영국 허퍼드실르 리샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Longchamp II(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma St Leger(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Eustace Devereux Of Hereford(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1248년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Longchamp nasceu em 1164, em Lyonshall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Longchamp II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Emma St Leger, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Eustace Devereux Of Hereford. Ela faleceu em 1248, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia de Longchamp родилась в 1164 г. в местности леншолл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Longchamp II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Emma St Leger, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Eustace Devereux Of Hereford. Она умерла в 1248 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia de Longchamp nació en 1164, en Lyonshall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Longchamp II, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Emma St Leger, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Eustace Devereux Of Hereford. Murió en 1248, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
